title: More Nonsense Limerick 21
content:
There was an old man at a Station,
    Who made a promiscuous oration;
    But they said, "Take some snuff! - 
    You have talk'd quite enough,
    You afflicting old man at a Station!"
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 21" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
